name: BlueScope Steel Limited
description: BlueScope Steel Limited is a global leader in metal coating and painting, specializing in the production of flat steel products. Headquartered in Australia, the company manufactures and distributes a wide range of branded steel products, including COLORBOND steel, ZINCALUME steel, and LYSAGHT building products. Operating across Australia, New Zealand, North America, and Asia, BlueScope serves the building and construction, manufacturing, and automotive industries with high-quality, sustainable steel solutions.
